title: AVO: Agentic Variation Operators for Autonomous Evolutionary Search
reason: Agentic evolutionary search discovers GPU attention kernels that beat cuDNN and FlashAttention-4 on NVIDIA Blackwell.

title: Claudini: Autoresearch Discovers State-of-the-Art Adversarial Attack Algorithms for LLMs
reason: A concrete demonstration that autonomous research agents can discover stronger LLM jailbreak and prompt injection algorithms than existing baselines.

title: DreamerAD: Efficient Reinforcement Learning via Latent World Model for Autonomous Driving
reason: Compresses diffusion-based world-model sampling from 100 steps to 1 step and turns latent-space RL into a practical autonomous driving training pipeline.

title: UI-Voyager: A Self-Evolving GUI Agent Learning via Failed Experience
reason: A 4B GUI agent that learns from failed experience and surpasses human-level performance on AndroidWorld.

title: MARCH: Multi-Agent Reinforced Self-Check for LLM Hallucination
reason: Uses information-asymmetric multi-agent verification to reduce hallucinations and make smaller models compete with stronger closed systems.

title: Latent-WAM: Latent World Action Modeling for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
reason: A compact latent world planner that pushes state of the art on NAVSIM v2 and HUGSIM with much lower data and compute requirements.

title: TAG: Target-Agnostic Guidance for Stable Object-Centric Inference in Vision-Language-Action Models
reason: A simple inference-time guidance method that materially improves object grounding robustness in cluttered robotic manipulation settings.

title: Chameleon: Episodic Memory for Long-Horizon Robotic Manipulation
reason: Introduces geometry-grounded episodic memory for robots and shows stronger long-horizon control under perceptual aliasing.

title: VFIG: Vectorizing Complex Figures in SVG with Vision-Language Models
reason: Tackles high-fidelity figure-to-SVG conversion with a strong dataset, benchmark, and a model that approaches frontier proprietary systems.

title: Analysing the Safety Pitfalls of Steering Vectors
reason: Shows that activation steering can sharply change jailbreak success rates, making the controllability-versus-safety tradeoff concrete.
